name: Impossible Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------STREUSEL----------------------------------
Heat oven to 400.
Grease pie plate, 10 x 1 1/2".
Beat all ingredients except pie filling and Streusel until smooth, 15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute with a hand beater.
Pour into the plate.
Spoon pie filling evenly over top.
Bake for 25 minutes.
Top with Streusel.
Bake until streusel is brown, about 10 minutes longer.
Cool; refrigerate any remaining pie.
STREUSEL: Cut margarine into Bisquick, brown sugar, and cinnamon until crumbly.
